description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a dark brown finish, featuring a flat, spacious tabletop suitable for writing or computer work. On the left side, there are two integrated drawers with simple, rectangular metal handles, providing storage for office supplies or documents. The desk is supported by four sturdy, black legs, with the left side legs partially obscured by the drawer unit. The back and right sides of the desk are enclosed with solid panels, giving it a clean and professional appearance. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with no decorative elements or visible hardware beyond the drawer handles. The desk's robust construction and neutral color scheme make it suitable for a variety of urban environments, such as offices, schools, or public workspaces.
description: A dark brown rectangular desk with two left-side drawers, black legs, and a minimalist, professional design. The desk features a spacious top and solid side and back panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two left-side drawers with metal handles and the open leg space on the right.
description_view_1: Side view showing the solid panel on the left and the depth of the tabletop, with no drawers visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full-width solid back panel and the side of the drawer unit.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the solid panel and the edge of the drawers, with no handles visible.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the two drawers and open leg space, while the solid panel side is intended to face away from the user.
